title: Error boundaries
description: Catch render errors and show fallback UI.

options: Render, lifecycle, and constructors of the tree below
questions.explanation: Event handlers still need normal try/catch.

options: Class components with componentDidCatch OR getDerivedStateFromError
questions.explanation: Function-component error boundaries don't exist yet. Wrap with react-error-boundary or a class.

options: An error boundary for the route
questions.explanation: Route-level error UI without needing your own class boundary.

options: Placed strategically (per route/section) to isolate failures
questions.explanation: Balance blast radius: enough to isolate, not so many that logs get noisy.
